title: VimFu — :g with :m — Collect Matches
description: Use :g/{pattern}/m {line} to move all matching lines to a specific location, collecting them together.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file with scattered imports

setup.content:
import os
x = 1
import sys
y = 2
import json
z = 3
import re

steps.say: Global with move collects matching lines and puts them together.

steps.comment: --- Demo: type the command, narrate while it's on the cmdline, then commit ---

steps.say: The imports are scattered. Let's move them all to the top.
Colon G slash caret import slash matches any line starting with import. Then M zero moves each match to after line zero — that is, the very top of the file.
All import lines collected at the top. The other lines kept their order below.
Global with M. Collect matching lines anywhere. Reorganize your file in one command.
